file_diffs.file_level_diff_summary: Adds deterministic fixture evidence for standard trade permit readiness without activating promotion.

readiness_evidence.summary: The fixture contains only committed synthetic metadata and cites the PP&D DevHub public guide anchor used for readiness review.

blocked_promotions.explanation: Promotion remains blocked until a reviewer verifies citations and separately approves any fixture activation.

review.rollback_note: Remove the fixture family and this ledger if readiness review fails.
